summary: Completed testing of P0 notification enhancements and database separation features. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All notification settings UI elements working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/users/preferences - Updates notification_sound_enabled to true
Backend: PUT /api/users/preferences - Updates notification_sound_enabled to false
Backend: GET /api/environment/current - Returns backend_env and backend_database fields
Backend: /api/environment/current - Database naming convention verified (production -> clt_synapse_prod)
Backend: GET /api/notifications - Returns proper structure with entity fields
Frontend: Notification Settings section visible with Bell icon
Frontend: Notification Sounds toggle present and functional
Frontend: Toggle changes state (enabled -> disabled -> enabled)
Frontend: General Alert test button present and clickable
Frontend: New Lead Alert test button present and clickable
Frontend: Description text explains different sounds for leads vs general notifications
Frontend: Notification dropdown accessible from header
Frontend: Environment switcher visible in header (shows 'testing')
critical_code_review_comments: Code implementation is clean and follows best practices
User preferences API correctly placed before /users/{user_id} route to avoid collision
Notification sounds use base64-encoded WAV files for portability
Environment-based database selection logic is well-structured with fallbacks
seed_data_creation: None required - tested with existing super_admin user
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 notification enhancements fully implemented: 1) Two notification sounds (general vs lead alerts) with different audio tones in Layout.jsx. 2) Settings page has Notification Settings section with toggle and test buttons. 3) Backend /api/users/preferences GET/PUT endpoints for notification_sound_enabled. 4) Backend /api/environment/current returns backend_env and backend_database. 5) Database connects based on APP_ENV (currently production -> clt_synapse_prod). 6) Notifications include entity_type and entity_id for click-through navigation (handled in Layout.jsx handleNotificationClick function).

features_verified.settings_notification_section: Working - Toggle, test buttons, description all present
features_verified.notification_sound_toggle: Working - Changes state and syncs with backend
features_verified.test_sound_buttons: Working - General Alert and New Lead Alert buttons clickable
features_verified.notification_dropdown: Working - Shows notifications with click-through support
features_verified.environment_switcher: Working - Visible in header, shows current mode
